form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (16.61) in a Grade 5, finishing a 1.5 lengths third. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: Placed last time (16.70) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 3 lengths. Goes very well off the draw boasting five wins and six places from 12 starts. Makes appeal on best.

form.formComment: Scored (22.52) last time out at this track in a Grade 6 and will break from box 3 for the first time. Rates a leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Scored (22.52) last time out at this track in a Grade 6 and will break from box 3 for the first time. Rates a leading player.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Gawler to win by a neck in 23.16, beating Oscar Intention. Last start finished 4th over 530m at Angle Park beaten 7 lengths (31.01) behind Compton Gypsy in a Grade 5 on April 9. Will need to improve to feature.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.75 lengths over 300m at this track in a handy (16.91), beating Storm Sister. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 1.75 lengths over 300m at this track in a handy (16.91), beating Storm Sister. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to run well.

form.formComment: Backs up after winning by 0.8 lengths at Angle Park (20.02) beating Our Bella Rose in a Grade 6 on April 13 four days ago. This is much harder assignment and he needs to find another gear.

form.formComment: Jumped well at Angle Park two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at this track last start over 300m. Unbeaten in two starts from this draw. Key runner.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.50) when sixth over 400m at Gawler in a Grade 5. Has two successes and four minors from seven starts from box 8. Can hit the frame with the right run.
